title: Transform pCas9
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4j2hu","text":"this protocol is aimed to provide instructions of transforming pCas9, which is a key step of knock-out gene by Crispr/Cas9","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"779at","text":"competent MG1655, pCas9 plasmids, LB agar mediums (contain chloramphenicol), LB broth","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix 50 µL of competent MG1655 with 10 µL of pCas9
Keep the reaction mix on ice for 00:30:00, minutes
Then, transfer the mix to the water bath set at 42 °C for 00:00:45
Next, keep the mix on the ice for 00:02:00
Add 940 µL LB broth and incubate the cells at 37 °C with vigorous shaking (200 rpm) for 01:00:00
Plate the cells on LB-agar plates containing chloramphenicol
creator: Qiaowa Gong
